turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, may I speak with [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Who's calling?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This is [AGENT_NAME] from [AGENCY_NAME]. I am a debt collector calling to collect a debt. Any information obtained will be used for that purpose. May I speak with [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah, this is [CONSUMER_NAME]. What do you want?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME]. Before we continue, can you confirm your date of birth for verification?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: It's [DATE_OF_BIRTH]. What's this about?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I'm calling regarding a [CREDITOR_NAME] account with a balance of [DEBT_AMOUNT]. A validation notice has been sent to your address on file. Do you have any questions about the debt?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Actually, yeah. I want you to stop calling me. I've already told your company twice. Stop contacting me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand your frustration, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME], but we still need to resolve this account. If you can make a payment of at least five hundred dollars today, we can—

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [overlapping] Did you not hear me? I said stop calling me. Do not contact me again.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you, but if you don't pay something today, this will go to our legal department and your credit will be further damaged. Can we at least set up a small payment of—

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: No! Stop! I don't want to hear about payment plans. I told you last week to take me off your list.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, okay. But before I let you go, are you sure you don't want to settle for seventy-five percent? It's a good deal and—

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I'm not interested in your deal. I don't want you people calling me anymore. How many times do I have to say it?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME]. I'm just saying that if you pay something — anything — today, I can make a note that you're cooperating and we can—

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [overlapping] I'm not cooperating! Stop calling!

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Uh... okay. But real quick, are you sure you can't do even two hundred? Just to show good faith?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I am telling you right now. Stop. Calling. Me. I don't care about the debt right now. I care about you leaving me alone.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Alright, alright. But just so you know, if we don't hear from you by Friday, this account will be referred for further action. That's all I'm saying.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Fine. Do whatever. Just stop calling. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wait, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME], one more thing—

turns.speaker: system
turns.text: [Click]

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello? Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME]?
